---
title: "WCPFC SC22 — Apia, Samoa"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
---

This page collects the opal materials prepared for the [Western and Central Pacific Fisheries Commission (WCPFC) 22nd Regular Session of the Scientific Committee (SC22)](https://meetings.wcpfc.int/meetings/sc22),  held in Apia, Samoa, from 11–19 August 2026. The working paper is also available on the [WCPFC SC22 meeting page](https://meetings.wcpfc.int/node/32247), and the accompanying presentation is available below.

## Working paper

### HTML

{{< html file="opal-sc22-wp.html" height="500px" width="100%">}}

<br>

### PDF

{{< pdf file="opal-sc22-wp.pdf"  height="500px">}}

<br>

## Presentation

{{< revealjs file="opal-sc22-pres.html" height="500px" class="ratio ratio-16x9" >}}
